title: atragene koreana
intro: Atragene koreana, also known as Paeonia koreana, is a species of flowering plant in the family Paeoniaceae, native to Korea. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. Atragene koreana is used to treat various health conditions, including menstrual cramps, menopausal symptoms, and skin conditions, due to its health benefits such as pain relief, improved sleep, and enhanced skin health. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and capsules, which are available in health food stores and online, although its availability and efficacy may vary depending on the region and quality of the preparation.
